findings.detail: The template names were not obvious at a glance, so picking one feels a little like guessing.
findings.proposed_solution: Show a short plain-English label under each template so I can tell what vibe it gives without opening it.

findings.detail: There are only 3 palette choices, which makes the style options feel somewhat limited.
findings.proposed_solution: Add brief descriptions for the color palettes, like calm, bold, or warm, so choosing feels easier.

findings.detail: The chat box is present, but it is not clear what it can help with before trying it.
findings.proposed_solution: Add one sentence near the chat box explaining what kinds of help I can ask for.

warnings.detail: The template names were not obvious at a glance, so picking one feels a little like guessing.
There are only 3 palette choices, which makes the style options feel somewhat limited.
The chat box is present, but it is not clear what it can help with before trying it.
